github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Generate a commit message with exactly ONE header from: Feature, Refactor, Fix, Test, Todo. Do NOT use multiple sections. Format: Header followed by ':' and newline bullet points. Each bullet must start with '-' and use past tense verbs like Added, Updated, Removed, Refactored, Implemented. Keep it concise and well grouped. Do NOT use conventional commit format.
